channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pioneering Machines Keep Donated Organs Alive Before Transplant
item.description: For the first time in Australia, the Austin Hospital in Melbourne has successfully performed a double transplant using pioneering organ perfusion technology. The procedure allowed a 51-year-old father...

item.title: Pakistani Exports Face Headwinds: GSP+ Benefits Offset by Conflict and Competition
item.description: Things aren't looking too rosy for Pakistani exporters at the moment, aye? The news is that our exports to Europe are slowing down, despite us still having that GSP+ status which gives us duty-free ac...

item.title: AFP vows to cooperate with any probe into Toboso clash
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) expressed their readiness to cooperate with any investigation regarding the recent encounter in Toboso, Negros Occidental. The AFP made this statement after c...

item.title: Security breach and gunfire disrupt White House Correspondents' Dinner as shooter is apprehended
item.description: A disturbing incident unfolded at the White House Correspondents' Dinner on Saturday evening when Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old teacher from Torrance, California, breached security at the Washington...

item.title: Exploring Undiscovered Tuscan Villages and Coastal Charms
item.description: Tuscany, renowned for its rolling hills and artistic heritage, offers far more than just Florence and Pisa. This article unveils a selection of lesser-known destinations across the region, perfect for...

item.title: Funke Adesiyan Withdraws from Oyo House of Representatives Race After Consultations
item.description: Popular Nollywood actress wey turn politician, Funke Adesiyan, don officially withdraw from the race to represent Ibadan South-East/North-East Federal Constituency for Oyo State under the All Progress...

item.title: Trump commends Secret Service following shooting at White House Correspondents' dinner

item.title: A Look Back at Daniel Padilla’s Most Influential Roles in Philippine Entertainment

item.title: Trump and Vance escorted off stage during Correspondents' Dinner event

item.title: PM Modi assures Matua Namasudras of citizenship under CAA ahead of West Bengal polls
item.description: During a poll rally in Bongaon, West Bengal, Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the Matua Namasudra community, assuring them of citizenship under the Citizenship Amendment Act (CAA). This statemen...

item.title: Suspect in White House Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting Held as Lone Actor, Investigation Under Way
item.description: A suspect in a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, D.C., appears to have acted alone, according to local police officials cited in the Wall Street Journal’s live...

item.title: P.E.I. potato farmers face rising costs and uncertainty ahead of planting season after drought and global tensions
item.description: Potato growers in Prince Edward Island are heading into the 2026 planting season under mounting pressure after a difficult year marked by drought and new global economic uncertainties linked to confli...

item.title: Dangote Cement and Nigeria's Economic Reforms: An Unseen Cost
item.description: A recent Premium Times investigation has uncovered a concerning trend within Nigeria’s economic reforms – the disproportionate burden placed on Dangote Cement, a vital component of the nation's infras...

item.title: FBI investigates disappearance of California man after alleged fraud and impersonation
item.description: The FBI has joined an ongoing investigation into the disappearance of Naiping Hou, a 74-year-old man from Southern California, whose case has raised suspicions of fraud and possible foul play. Hou, th...

item.title: Ottawa River Water Levels Stable, Authorities Warn of Possible Second Flood Peak
item.description: Water levels on the Ottawa River near the capital remain stable following recent rises due to spring runoff and rainfall. Despite current stability, hydrologists and local authorities warn that a seco...

item.title: Pakistan's Emerging Role as Regional Stability Provider
item.description: In these times of global disorder with wars raging in South Asia, Europe, and now the Middle East, force is being used without regard for international law. The latest example was the 40-day war by th...
